transcript: I need to— I need, uh… to get out on the water and, uh, get a new boat pretty soon.
Uh, I need to go real fast, uh… real soon.
Is that gonna work or what?
Are you lookin’ to rent a boat?
Yeah! Why do ya keep hangin’ up?
Because you sound like a flake. You sound like you’re… on drugs.
What in the world do you mean?
Look, if you’re not gonna be serious, then don’t call me back, alright?—
You lookin’ to get y’ass whooped or what?
Yes, I was interested in renting a speedboat for this weekend.
Uh, it’s a hundred-dollar deposit per day, if you wanna hold the day.
This guy’s an idiot. Just hang up on him.
For real. Quit callin’. He’s on drugs!
Yes, I was wondering if you guys delivered boats.
If you keep calling us, you’re gonna get Harassment. We will file charges. Stop calling.
Do I have to pick up or can you come to me with the boats?
Yeah, I was, uh… wondering if you guys would accept a gold chain for… a boat.
Yeah, and you’ve called like a thousand times, Jason.
Oh, okay, Ben. You and your boyfriend Jason: have fun on your little Sea-Doo Islandia and… do anything you wanna do, okay? You can play with skis, you can do anything you want. Have fun.
L.V. Boats here! Gayest boats in town!
Listen up, dude: What, are you guys queer or what?
Yeah, I wanna suck you off!
My name’s Jason and I’m… gay! I love it in my ass!
Are you gonna trade my gold chain for your water skis or not?
We don’t even have any water skis and we're not trading anything in, dude! Stop calling.
If you continue to call, we’ll file harassment. We got your number already. So that unknown… crap that you’re doin’, it doesn’t work.
Yeah, the one-two-three-four-five-six, yeah, it— it— it doesn’t work, bro.
Your bogus Craigslist is not gonna work.
What’re you talking about, bro?! We’re gonna trade our— a— a skis for a freaking gold chain! How dumb are you?
I don’t care if it’s "a long chain"!
Money talks and bullshit walks, bro.
Pshh… You never heard o’ Byron, though, huh?
That dude goes, like, 200 miles an hour in a boat.
I bet he’ll go 200 miles an hour in your ass, too!
Shh… So I got one chain for one boat, period, end o’ discussion.
Dude, I’m not doin’ it! Stop callin’! Why do you, like, continue to call? You like continue to call. It’s comical.
I have never called you before. I saw it on Craigslist or Emily’s List or whatever it was and I called.
Wait… "Emily"? [laughs] Dude, you call a lot, bro. Don’t act dumb. Don’t play stupid.
You got that covered, so… I’m gonna knock ya out and then, uh…
…I’m gonna ride around in a boat all day.
I would love for you to come over here and try to knock me out. You don’t even know what I look like! [stammers] Look, just please come over here or kno— try to knock me out.
Come over to Nevada Boat Company. We partnered up with them, too. We’re gonna start storin’ out boats over there.
I’m gonna… take ya out, period.
You’re gonna take me out and stick it in my ass, ya little homo? [unclear] Outback Steakhouse.
I’ll meet you at the Steakhouse.
Ay, ay, hold on, hold on! Hey, hold on. This is gonna be fun. This guy’s bored! So you must not be gettin’ very good business, huh?
So your business is so great you gotta call and harass people?
It’s Friday night, man, and you’re the one on Craigslist so… you work it out.
Whoa, we’re on Craigslist and we’re gonna "work it out"? I’m not on Craigslist, jackass.
"Call me for boats"? That’s what it says right now? [laughs] "Call me for boats"!

Dude, you’re comical, dude. You’re— You’re very comical. I mean, you— you, like, [stammers] I honestly wanna know if you have nothin’ better to do than call people on Craigslist. This guy… this guy’s a complete moron!
My name is Jason Fulton and I live off Ohokee and Pueblo and I… rent my house 'cause I can’t afford to buy my own fuckin' house.
What do you care where I live?
You’re 35 years old goin’ nowhere in live, right? Teamin’ up with Nevada Boat Company? You’re doin’ somethin’ right!
I’m the one askin’ the questions here…

Dude, you’re hilarious! Gosh, you’re makin’ my day! This is awesome! I wanna hear— Just keep on bein’ stupid, because you’re making yourself sound like a complete imbecile. You’re awesome. Dude, are you high right now?
Dude, we don’t have jet skis, we don’t have skis, we don’t have chains, we don’t have anchors, we don’t have propellers, we don’t have any of that crap! We are— We are a boat rental company.
We’re a dildo rental company. You can— You can rent used dildos to fuck Jason Fulton in the ass.
On a Sea-Doo Islandia like me! And partner up with Nevada Company, if you like, as well.
